choices.text: <400 ft AGL, daylight (or civil twilight with anti-collision lights), VLOS (visual line of sight), <55 lbs, yield to manned aircraft, no flight over people without waiver, <100 mph ground speed. Controlled airspace needs LAANC authorization.

LAANC (Low Altitude Authorization + Notification Capability) automated authorization via Aloft / B4UFLY apps. Near-instant approval. Required for Class B/C/D/surface E under 400 ft. Without it = federal violation + $1k+ fines.
